'''Eeropha''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Eeropha system]]<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/30387023|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2009-08-28|time=11:05 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180225165344/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-109}}</ref> of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nierport VII]].

==History==
It was a major refueling station for ships destined for [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by native [[Sano Sauro]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' {{Imo}}
